infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You are in a 厨房. An ordinary kind of place.

 You see [if c_1 is locked]a locked[else if c_1 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] food waste bin nearby.[if c_1 is open and there is something in the c_1] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_1]. Now that's what I call TextWorld![end if][if c_1 is open and the c_1 contains nothing] The food waste bin is empty! What a waste of a day![end if] You make out [if c_10 is locked]a locked[else if c_10 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] other waste bin.[if c_10 is open and there is something in the c_10] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_10].[end if][if c_10 is open and the c_10 contains nothing] The other waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can see [if c_4 is locked]a locked[else if c_4 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] recyclable bin close by.[if c_4 is open and there is something in the c_4] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_4].[end if][if c_4 is open and the c_4 contains nothing] The recyclable bin is empty! What a waste of a day![end if] You can make out [if c_7 is locked]a locked[else if c_7 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] hazardous waste bin.[if c_7 is open and there is something in the c_7] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_7].[end if][if c_7 is open and the c_7 contains nothing] What a letdown! The hazardous waste bin is empty![end if]

You need an unblocked exit? You should try going west.

infos.name: 花园
infos.desc:
Well, here we are in a 花园.

 You make out [if c_0 is locked]a locked[else if c_0 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] food waste bin.[if c_0 is open and there is something in the c_0] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_0].[end if][if c_0 is open and the c_0 contains nothing] What a letdown! The food waste bin is empty![end if] You bend down to tie your shoe. When you stand up, you notice a recyclable bin.[if c_3 is open and there is something in the c_3] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_3].[end if][if c_3 is open and the c_3 contains nothing] The recyclable bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can make out a hazardous waste bin.[if c_6 is open and there is something in the c_6] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_6].[end if][if c_6 is open and the c_6 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if] You can see an other waste bin. Classic TextWorld.[if c_9 is open and there is something in the c_9] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_9]. There's something strange about this thing being here, but you don't have time to worry about that now.[end if][if c_9 is open and the c_9 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if]

You don't like doors? Why not try going east, that entranceway is unblocked. There is an exit to the south. Don't worry, it is unblocked.

infos.name: 家中
infos.desc:
You arrive in a 家中. A typical kind of place.

 You see [if c_11 is locked]a locked[else if c_11 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] other waste bin here.[if c_11 is open and there is something in the c_11] The other waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_11].[end if][if c_11 is open and the c_11 contains nothing] What a letdown! The other waste bin is empty![end if] You rest your hand against a wall, but you miss the wall and fall onto a food waste bin.[if c_2 is open and there is something in the c_2] The food waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_2].[end if][if c_2 is open and the c_2 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You see [if c_5 is locked]a locked[else if c_5 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] recyclable bin in the corner.[if c_5 is open and there is something in the c_5] The recyclable bin contains [a list of things in the c_5]. Now that's what I call TextWorld![end if][if c_5 is open and the c_5 contains nothing] Empty! What kind of nightmare TextWorld is this?[end if] You make out [if c_8 is locked]a locked[else if c_8 is open]an opened[otherwise]a closed[end if] hazardous waste bin right there by you.[if c_8 is open and there is something in the c_8] The hazardous waste bin contains [a list of things in the c_8].[end if][if c_8 is open and the c_8 contains nothing] The hazardous waste bin is empty, what a horrible day![end if]

You need an unguarded exit? You should try going north.

walkthrough: take metal can
insert metal can into recyclable bin
take banana peel
insert banana peel into food waste bin
take plastic bottle
insert plastic bottle into recyclable bin
take used battery
insert used battery into hazardous waste bin
take expired medicine
insert expired medicine into hazardous waste bin
take delivery box
insert delivery box into recyclable bin
take leftover rice
insert leftover rice into food waste bin
take shampoo bottle
insert shampoo bottle into recyclable bin
take plastic straw
insert plastic straw into other waste bin
take dusty tissue
insert dusty tissue into other waste bin

objective: 把垃圾投放到正确类别：易拉罐→可回收物、香蕉皮→厨余垃圾、塑料瓶→可回收物、废电池→有害垃圾、过期药品→有害垃圾、快递纸箱→可回收物、剩米饭→厨余垃圾、洗发水空瓶→可回收物、吸管→其他垃圾、脏纸巾→其他垃圾
